name: full-test-both-viewports
description: Run the complete test suite (flows + visual) at both viewports
expected_behavior: Parses as scope=full, viewport=both, target=all. Runs all 10 flows and visual tests on all discovered pages at both 1440x900 and 375x812. Produces a report at .reports/browser-test-YYYY-MM-DD.md with flow results, visual results, bug list, and cleanup log.

name: flows-only
description: Run only flow tests with default viewports
expected_behavior: Parses as scope=flows, viewport=both, target=all. Runs all 10 flow test scripts from references/flows.md. Skips visual page scanning entirely. Report contains flow results table but no pages-tested table.

name: visual-mobile-profile
description: Run visual tests on the profile page at mobile viewport only
expected_behavior: Parses as scope=visual, viewport=mobile, target=/profile. Discovers the profile route via glob. Resizes to 375x812 only (skips desktop). Applies 10-point visual checklist. Report contains only the profile page in the pages-tested table.
